projects.title: ETABS Building Analysis
projects.description: Structural modelling and analysis of building frame systems using ETABS for gravity and lateral load assessment.

projects.title: SAP2000 Truss / Bridge Analysis
projects.description: Truss and bridge-type structural analysis using SAP2000, including member force evaluation and structural behaviour study.

projects.title: Structural Design Project
projects.description: Structural design and analysis work involving beams, columns, frames, trusses, and engineering design documentation.
